displayProperties.name: Champion Memento
displayProperties.description:
A rare curio obtained from an activity.

When inserted into a Shaped weapon at the Relic, this Memento will grant the weapon additional vanity options.

You may only store one of these Mementos at a time.

displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament to change the appearance of Ophidian Aspect. Once you get an ornament, it's unlocked for all characters on your account.

displayProperties.name: Polemology
displayProperties.description: Equip this weapon ornament to change the appearance of the Queenbreaker. Once you get an ornament, it's unlocked for all characters on your account.

displayProperties.name: Xenos Shore Ornament
displayProperties.description: Complete weekly strike milestones during Season 2 to earn this ornament. It is unlocked to the Took Offense, Shelter in Place, and Xenos Vale IV chest armor.

displayProperties.name: Sword Scavenger
displayProperties.description: This perk has been deprecated and no longer functions.

displayProperties.name: Hailstorm
displayProperties.description: Kills increase this weapon's damage and begin to steadily reload the magazine from reserves until you stop firing.

displayProperties.name: Misthios Vest
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament on any eligible Legendary armor item to change its appearance. Once you get a universal ornament, it's unlocked for all characters of the relevant class on your account.

displayProperties.name: Fulfillment Ornament
displayProperties.description: Equip this weapon ornament to change the appearance of Ascendancy. Once you get an ornament, it's unlocked for all characters on your account.

displayProperties.name: Gr1p-EE5
displayProperties.description: Equip this ornament with St0mp-EE5 to activate a unique visual effect.

displayProperties.name: Masterwork Armor
displayProperties.description: This armor reduces incoming damage while your Super is active.
